spec.expr:
label_join(  min(
  time() - container_start_time_seconds{
      namespace=~"$namespace",
      pod=~"$component.*",
      pod=~"$pod",
      container=~"$container",
      image!~"registry.k8s.io/pause:3.10", 
      id=~".*.scope",
      pod!~"",
      container!~"" 
  }
) by (pod, container, namespace),
  "podcontainer",
  ":",
  "pod",
  "container"
)

label_join(
  sum(
    kube_pod_container_resource_limits{
        resource="cpu",
        namespace=~"$namespace",
        pod=~"$component.*",
        pod=~"$pod",
        container=~"$container",
        pod!~"",
        container!~""
    }
  ) by (pod, container, namespace),
  "podcontainer",
  ":",
  "pod",
  "container"
)

label_join(
  sum(
    kube_pod_container_resource_requests{
        resource="cpu",
        namespace=~"$namespace",
        pod=~"$component.*",
        pod=~"$pod",
        container=~"$container",
        pod!~"",
        container!~""
    }
  ) by (pod, container, namespace),
  "podcontainer",
  ":",
  "pod",
  "container"
)

label_join(  sum(
    container_memory_working_set_bytes{
      namespace=~"$namespace",
      pod=~"$component.*",
      pod=~"$pod",
      container=~"$container",
      image!~"registry.k8s.io/pause:3.10", 
      id=~".*.scope",
      pod!~"",
      container!~""
    }
  ) by (pod, container, namespace),
  "podcontainer",
  ":",
  "pod",
  "container"
)

label_join(
  sum(
    kube_pod_container_resource_limits{
      resource=~"memory",
      namespace=~"$namespace",
      pod=~"$component.*",
      pod=~"$pod",
      container=~"$container",
      pod!~"",
      container!~""
    }
  ) by (pod, container, namespace),
  "podcontainer",
  ":",
  "pod",
  "container"
)

label_join(
  sum(
    kube_pod_container_resource_requests{
      resource=~"memory",
      namespace=~"$namespace",
      pod=~"$component.*",
      pod=~"$pod",
      container=~"$container",
      pod!~"",
      container!~""
    }
  ) by (pod, container, namespace),
  "podcontainer",
  ":",
  "pod",
  "container"
)

spec.definition: query_result(count by (owner_name) ( kube_pod_owner{ namespace=~"$namespace", owner_kind=~"StatefulSet|DaemonSet" } ) or count by (owner_name) ( kube_replicaset_owner{ namespace=~"$namespace", owner_kind="Deployment" } ))
spec.label: Component
spec.name: component

spec.query: query_result(count by (owner_name) ( kube_pod_owner{ namespace=~"$namespace", owner_kind=~"StatefulSet|DaemonSet" } ) or count by (owner_name) ( kube_replicaset_owner{ namespace=~"$namespace", owner_kind="Deployment" } ))
